message:
🐛 Align k8s.io deps + Dockerfile Go version to 1.26 (#10606)

k8s.io/api and apimachinery were bumped to v0.36.0 (PRs #10543, #10550)
but client-go and apiextensions-apiserver remained at v0.35.4, causing
build failures (missing packages k8s.io/api/autoscaling/v2beta1,
v2beta2, scheduling/v1alpha1). Dockerfile also needed golang:1.26-alpine.

Fixes #10585
Fixes #10588

Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
 # Build stage - Backend
-FROM golang:1.25-alpine@sha256:5caaf1cca9dc351e13deafbc3879fd4754801acba8653fa9540cea125d01a71f AS backend-builder
+FROM golang:1.26-alpine AS backend-builder
 
 WORKDIR /app

@@ -13,17 +13,17 @@ require (
 	github.com/joho/godotenv v1.5.1
 	github.com/prometheus/client_golang v1.23.2
 	github.com/prometheus/client_model v0.6.2
-	github.com/prometheus/common v0.66.1
+	github.com/prometheus/common v0.67.5
 	github.com/stretchr/testify v1.11.1
 	go.uber.org/goleak v1.3.0

 	golang.org/x/sync v0.20.0
 	golang.org/x/time v0.15.0
 	gopkg.in/yaml.v3 v3.0.1
 	k8s.io/api v0.36.0
-	k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver v0.35.4
+	k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver v0.36.0
 	k8s.io/apimachinery v0.36.0
-	k8s.io/client-go v0.35.4
+	k8s.io/client-go v0.36.0
 	modernc.org/sqlite v1.50.0
 )
